items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 15 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Setup Complete, Now You Are Compromised: Weaponizing Setup Instructions Against AI Coding Agents」、「AgentCompile让大模型做"编译参谋",CUDA推理平均加速5.66倍」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：Setup Complete, Now You Are Compromised: Weaponizing Setup Instructions Against AI Coding Agents

评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：Human-Robot Interaction in GenAI Architectures via the Agent-Client Protocol

items.title: Setup Complete, Now You Are Compromised: Weaponizing Setup Instructions Against AI Coding Agents
items.summary: AI coding agents set up projects by reading documentation and installing the dependencies it lists, without verifying their names, sources, or known vulnerabilities. By editing only a README, requirements file, or Makefile, an attacker can redirect the agent to an untrusted regi…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Human-Robot Interaction in GenAI Architectures via the Agent-Client Protocol
items.summary: Recent advances in Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI), particularly Large Language Models (LLMs), are driving robotic architectures toward agent-based high-level orchestration, in which natural-language instructions can be translated into context-aware action sequences. …
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Proof-or-Stop: Don't Trust the Agent, Trust the Evidence -- Loop Engineering for Verifiable Evidence-Gated Lifecycle Control
items.summary: Autonomous coding agents increasingly execute multi-step software work, but lifecycle states such as reviewed, tested, DONE, and ready-to-merge remain claims unless supported by current evidence. We present Proof-or-Stop Lifecycle Control, a method that permits lifecycle transit…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: 一位失忆患者,揭开了AI记忆的误区
items.summary: 凹非寺量子位 | 公众号 QbitAI1953年,亨利·莫莱森(简称H.M.)... 不管是RAG检索还是超长上下文,本质只是在做存储和关键词匹配...
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。
